rounds.other_investors: Helena, Goldcrest Capital, Tapestry VC, Civilization Ventures, Plug and Play, Climate Capital, Yamaha Motor Ventures, BoxGroup, Sam Altman (angel)
rounds.robotnik_notes: Engineered-protein molecular assemblers extracting lithium and other critical metals from low-concentration brines. Targets oilfield wastewater and capped wells in OK/AR/TX — claims 30x domestic lithium production potential vs evaporative South American methods. Adjacent to Lilac, EnergyX in DLE category but biology-based vs ion-exchange.

rounds.other_investors: European Innovation Council, UVC Partners, Bayern Kapital, BMW i Ventures, BayBG
rounds.robotnik_notes: €15M (~$16.5M) round to scale modular BESS using second-life EV batteries. Multi-level inverter topology removes weakest-cell limitation that has hampered second-life applications. Sits at intersection of battery materials/recycling and grid storage — capital-light vs Hithium/Northvolt new-cell scale plays.

rounds.robotnik_notes: Refractory-brick thermal energy storage (heat battery) charged by renewables, discharging up to 1500°C industrial heat. First commercial unit live at Calgren biofuel plant. Strategic stack of cement (TITAN, SCG), petrochem (SABIC, Aramco), and mining (Rio Tinto) signals demand for industrial decarbonization. Adjacent to Antora and Kraftblock in TES category.

rounds.other_investors: Finindus, A&G Energy Transition Tech Fund, TechEnergy Ventures (Techint), Future Industry Ventures (Redstone, SBI Holdings)
rounds.robotnik_notes: €20M (~$22M) Series B for thermal storage built from recycled steel-slag composite. Stores up to 1300°C, multi-week duration. ArcelorMittal-linked Finindus and Techint involvement signals heavy-industry pull for high-temp electrification. Direct peer to Rondo, Antora; differentiated by use of waste-stream feedstock.

rounds.robotnik_notes: Modular zero-knowledge ecosystem; round funded launch of Manta Pacific L2 testnet for ZK applications and Asia expansion. Token (MANTA) launched Jan 2024. ZK as a primitive sits adjacent to AI/data privacy compute infra rather than physical DePIN, but tagged DePIN-adjacent given hardware ZK proving market emergence.
